title: Kanban Plan
description: Extend CineTaste discovery and rendering from today-plus-week to explicit today, next 7 days, and next 30 days horizons.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Add a month horizon so strongly matching upcoming movies can appear in a separate next-30-days section without losing today or next-7-days output.

DONE.task: Extend discovery to support a 30-day horizon and ensure month/week aggregation preserves per-movie links and available days.
DONE.notes: ct-fetch currently supports now/week/date only; parse_html_with_date also needs the same URL-attachment robustness as single-day parse_html.

DONE.task: Update formatting and pipeline behavior so the daily run emits sections for today, next 7 days, and next 30 days.
DONE.notes: Current renderer only splits into today versus later; pipeline likely needs a wider fetch horizon by default.

DONE.task: Update docs and verification notes for the new month horizon and changed default run behavior.
DONE.notes: Need docs aligned with fetch month mode, three output sections, and any new run defaults.

acceptance_criteria: A fresh implementation kanban exists and .aura/kanban/latest points to it
The pipeline can discover movies up to 30 days ahead
Rendered Telegram output has explicit sections for today, next 7 days, and next 30 days
Upcoming non-today profile matches such as later anime premieres can surface in the month section when they fall within 30 days
